---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''

---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see implemented.

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Is your feature request related to a problem?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working. A clear and concise description.

## Alternative Solutions

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe the use case and benefits this feature would bring. Example use cases:

- **Use Case 1**: <!-- e.g., Monitoring storage performance -->
- **Use Case 2**: <!-- e.g., Alerting on disk failures -->
- **Use Case 3**: <!-- e.g., Capacity planning -->

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or mockups about the feature request here.

## Impact Assessment

- **Breaking Changes**: <!-- Does this require breaking changes? -->
- **Performance Impact**: <!-- How will this affect performance? -->
- **Security Impact**: <!-- Any security implications? -->
- **Documentation Changes**: <!-- What docs need updating? -->

## Implementation Ideas

<!-- Any thoughts on how this could be implemented -->
- Implementation approach
- API changes needed
- Database/schema changes
- Configuration changes

## Priority

How important is this feature to you?

- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Important
- [ ] Critical
- [ ] Blocker

## Related Issues

<!-- Link to related issues -->
- References to any related issues or discussions
- Links to documentation or specifications

## Additional Requirements

- [ ] This feature would require tests
- [ ] This feature would require documentation
- [ ] This feature would require examples
- [ ] This feature would require configuration changes
- [ ] This feature would require backward compatibility

## Expected Timeline

<!-- Any estimate for when you'd like to see this implemented -->
- Short term (1-2 weeks)
- Medium term (1-2 months)
- Long term (3+ months)
- No specific timeline
